title: Complexity Classes, Reductions, and Feasibility Boundaries · Execution Trace: Decision Problems
summary: Explain why a requested exact optimizer needs changed scope or a bounded alternative. objectives: Translate optimization questions to decision form without losing the threshold meaning.

Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
